[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Nyroska''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer in the [[Darkknell Defense Agency]] with a great dislike for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and their form of justice. He served to coordinate local law enforcement in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Xakrea]] and bumped heads with both [[Hal Horn]] of [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] and [[Ysanne Isard]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]].

{{Char-stub}}
